mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, suite_code, object_code, object_name, object_type, model_id, model_code, display_field, icon, description, status, sort_order, options, design_status, config_key, last_publish_time, last_publish_version, designer_options, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time

SELECT o.id AS id, o.suite_code AS suiteCode, s.suite_name AS suiteName, o.object_code AS objectCode, o.object_name AS objectName, o.object_type AS objectType, o.model_id AS modelId, o.model_code AS modelCode, o.display_field AS displayField, o.icon AS icon, o.description AS description, o.status AS status, o.sort_order AS sortOrder, o.options AS options, o.design_status AS designStatus, o.config_key AS configKey, o.last_publish_time AS lastPublishTime, o.last_publish_version AS lastPublishVersion, o.designer_options AS designerOptions, COALESCE(r.relation_count, 0) AS relationCount, COALESCE(b.binding_count, 0) AS bindingCount, COALESCE(a.app_count, 0) AS appCount, o.create_time AS createTime, o.update_time AS updateTime FROM ai_business_object o LEFT JOIN ai_business_suite s ON s.tenant_id = o.tenant_id AND s.suite_code = o.suite_code LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, suite_code, source_object_code AS object_code, COUNT(1) AS relation_count FROM ai_business_object_relation GROUP BY tenant_id, suite_code, source_object_code ) r ON r.tenant_id = o.tenant_id AND r.suite_code = o.suite_code AND r.object_code = o.object_code LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, target_code, COUNT(1) AS binding_count FROM ai_business_binding WHERE target_type = 'OBJECT' GROUP BY tenant_id, target_code ) b ON b.tenant_id = o.tenant_id AND b.target_code = o.object_code LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, suite_code, object_code, COUNT(1) AS app_count FROM ai_business_app GROUP BY tenant_id, suite_code, object_code ) a ON a.tenant_id = o.tenant_id AND a.suite_code = o.suite_code AND a.object_code = o.object_code
mapper.select: ORDER BY o.sort_order ASC, o.id ASC
ORDER BY o.sort_order ASC, o.id ASC
